suppress.notes: False positive: CVE-2022-31691 is a Spring Tools 4 (Eclipse/VSCode IDE extension) YAML-editor RCE that abuses SnakeYAML. It has nothing to do with the spring-boot-devtools runtime library - NVD's CPE dictionary just conflates "spring_tools"/"spring_boot_tools" with this artifact.

Accepted risk: Hazelcast shades a real, vulnerable copy of Jackson (both the legacy com.fasterxml.jackson and new tools.jackson lines) internally under com.hazelcast.shaded.* for its own JSON-value/query features. Every one of these CVEs requires the application to deserialize attacker-controlled JSON via ObjectMapper.readValue with specific annotation setups. This project's CacheController only handles raw byte[] bodies and never touches Jackson, and the Hazelcast profile here only ever stores IMap<String, byte[]> - never HazelcastJsonValue or any JSON-query feature - so Hazelcast's internal shaded Jackson is never invoked. Revisit if this project starts using Hazelcast's JSON-aware APIs.
